title: Assessing Rocket Lab (RKLB) Valuation After Record US$816 Million Space Development Agency Contract
text: Following the record $816 million Space Development Agency contract award, analysts re-assessed Rocket Lab's valuation. Rocket Lab was awarded an $816 million contract to design and manufacture 18 satellites for the Tracking Layer Tranche 3 program under the Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture. Under the contract, Rocket Lab will deliver satellites equipped with advanced missile warning, tracking, and defense sensors to provide global, persistent detection and tracking of emerging missile threats, including hypersonic systems. This represents the company's largest single contract, enhancing its reputation in national security space. The contract opens up further subsystem opportunities, potentially elevating its total contract value to approximately $1 billion. As the only commercial provider producing both spacecraft and payloads in-house for the SDA Tracking Layer, Rocket Lab offers a solution combining speed, resilience, and affordability.
